title: Dragon Mounts Datapack
description: Dragon Mounts Datapack adds the Ability to Hatch Dragon Eggs into Rideable Pet Dragons!
body: # Dragon Mounts Datapack The **Dragon Mounts Datapack** adds the ability to hatch the Ender Dragon egg into **5 unique pet dragons**. Each dragon can be grown, cared for, and eventually ridden by the player. ## How to Get Started - Obtain a **Dragon Egg** - Defeat the Ender Dragon, **or** - Find it inside **End City chests** - Craft a **Hatchable Dragon Egg** using: - 🟣 Dragon Egg - 👁️ Eye of Ender - 💠 Echo Shard - Place the crafted egg down to begin the hatching process. ## Dragon Variants The dragon type depends on the **biome** where the egg is placed: - 🌳 **Forest Dragon** → Place egg in a **Forest biome** - 🌊 **Water Dragon** → Place egg in an **Ocean or River biome** - ❄️ **Ice Dragon** → Place egg in a **Snowy or Ice biome** - 🔥 **Fire Dragon** → Place egg in a **Cave biome** and surround it with **lava** ## Hatching Process - ⏳ After **3 in-game days**, the egg hatches into a **Baby Dragon** (sleeping phase). - 🍣 Feed the baby dragon **fish** to speed up its growth. - ⏳ After **2 more in-game days**, it matures into a **Full Adult Dragon**. Once fully grown, the dragon can be **ridden by the player**. ## Commands To Summon a Dragon use: `/function animated_java:dragonmounts/summon {args:{variant:default}}` To Get a Dragon Egg use: `/function animated_java:dragonmounts/ai/egg_phase/give_dragon_egg {variant:default}` > Change `default` value to any of other avaliable variants for different dragon/egg variant ## Credits - **Animated Java** (tool used for implementing models and animations): [Animated Java Website](https://animated-java.dev/) - **textures and assets**: - 🐉 Ender Dragon – *Tomanex* - 🔥 Fire Dragon – *leoslake9* - ❄️ Ice Dragon – *Kingdomall* - 🌳 Forest Dragon – *Unakitononeko* - 🌊 Water Dragon – *BarracudaATA4* ## Social Media Check out my **YouTube / Discord**! - 📺 YouTube: [Anas099](https://www.youtube.com/Anas099) - 💬 Discord: [Join Here](https://discord.gg/5d8PTx3kyR) Support me on **Ko-fi**: [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/K3K1KNLTA) ## Sponser **BisectHosting** provides Minecraft server hosting that gives players an easy and affordable way to host their Minecraft server! 💰 Get **25% Off** for your first month by using **my code**!
